indications.text:
MYHIBBIN is indicated for the prophylaxis of organ rejection, in adult and pediatric recipients 3 months of age
and older of allogeneic kidney [see Clinical Studies (14.1)], heart [see Clinical Studies (14.2)] or liver transplants
[see Clinical Studies (14.3)], in combination with other immunosuppre...
